included_components.permitted_use: Supply LC-001 through LC-022 as a standing analytical vocabulary in every text-analysis phase; evidence alone activates a named technique.
prohibited_use: Proof of concealment, hidden teaching, authorial intention, intended audience, or doctrinal truth
Treating Taxonomy availability as evidence that a component is present

included_components.permitted_use: Govern the ten-phase, thirty-seven-step inquiry while keeping the Inner Sanctum open in every phase and component activation evidence-governed.
prohibited_use: Replacement of primary evidence or constitutional safeguards
Silent reconstruction of missing Documentary Findings

known_conflicts: HOC-000000001 remains corpus-wide incomplete outside the bounded LC-001 through LC-022 scope.
DF-000130 through DF-000143, DF-000145, and DF-000148 through DF-000149 remain unavailable.
Availability of the Taxonomy does not establish component presence or a concealment conclusion.
Neo4j projection is neither included nor authorized by this Manifest.
fixity_construction: SHA-256 over each lexicographically sorted UTF-8 repository path, NUL, raw file bytes, NUL.
changelog: Successor release making the Inner Sanctum always open during text analysis.
Supplies the complete Taxonomy to every inquiry phase while preserving component-specific evidentiary activation.
Preserves MAN-000000001 as the historical closed-by-default release.
